name: @forwardimpact/libxmr
description: Wheeler/Vacanti XmR control charts — distinguish signal from noise so agent teams act on real changes, not fluctuations.
author: D. Olsson <hi@senzilla.io>

jobs.trigger: A metric changes and the team debates whether it is a real shift or just noise.
jobs.bigHire: distinguish signal from noise so the team acts on real changes, not fluctuations.
jobs.littleHire: chart a metric and see whether the latest point is within expected variation.
jobs.competesWith: eyeballing trend lines; arbitrary thresholds; ignoring metrics because no one trusts them
